Description: Change the material of the brush to a pattern of blocks.
Title: Block Pattern

Options.Description:
The block pattern to use as the material.

A block pattern is formatted like:

<%>Block_ID #1,<%>Block_ID #2,...<MORE BLOCKS>

The <%> is the percent of the blocks to set to a certain block type, and it is optional. The Block_ID is the ID of the block to use with the percent in front of it.

Example: To make the brush have materials made of Rock_Stone and Soil_Gravel, do:

Rock_Stone,Soil_Gravel

Example: To make the brush have materials where 75% of the materials are Rock_Stone and 25% made of Soil_Gravel, do:

75%Rock_Stone,25%Soil_Gravel
Options.Label: Block Pattern
